day_trace.speech: 好，大家聽好了——我可沒那個耐性坐在這裡等每個人玩那種『喔，我先讓別人發言』的把戲。昨晚我是<搗蛋鬼>。沒錯，你沒聽錯。我交換了[心理諮商師]和[統計學家]的卡片。我不知道他們最後拿到什麼，我也不在乎——這就是我做的事。所以如果你們兩位當中有人打算要聲稱什麼，最好把這個因素考慮進去，因為不管你一開始拿到的是什麼，現在已經不在你手上了。我的直覺告訴我，在有人開始編故事之前，最好先把這件事說清楚。下一位是誰？
day_trace.log_line: [2026-07-05 16:16:15 HKT] The Gut Player: Alright, listen up — I ain't sitting here waiting for everyone to do their little 'oh, I'll let someone else go first' routine. I was the Troublemaker last night. Yeah, you heard me. I swapped The Therapist and The Statistician's cards. Don't know what they ended up with, don't care — that's what I did. So if either of you two are about to claim something, you better factor that in, 'cause whatever you started with? It ain't what you're holding now. My gut's telling me to put this out there before someone starts spinning stories. Who's next?

day_trace.speech: 呃，大家好。抱歉，我知道我很可能會搞砸……昨晚我一開始是<預言家>。我查看了[攪局者]……結果他們是<狼人>。但是——我對這件事真的很困惑——我覺得有人在夜裡跟我交換了身分？因為我現在已經不是<預言家>了。所以我其實不知道我現在是什麼，這……老實說，真的很可怕。但我確實知道我看到了什麼。如果這資訊是錯的，或者我記錯了，我很抱歉，我只是非常焦慮，很怕搞錯。有沒有人有其他資訊可以幫我弄清楚現在的情況？如果我說錯了，請不要生氣。
day_trace.log_line: [2026-07-05 16:16:32 HKT] The Underdog: Um, hi everyone. Sorry, I know I'm probably going to mess this up... I started as the <Seer> last night. I looked at The Chaos Agent and... they were a <Werewolf>. But - and I'm really confused about this - I think someone swapped with me during the night? Because I'm not the Seer anymore. So I don't actually know what I am now, which is... terrifying, honestly. But I do know what I saw. I'm sorry if this is wrong, or if I'm remembering incorrectly, I'm just so anxious about getting this right. Does anyone else have information that could help me figure out what's happening? Please don't be mad if I got it wrong.

day_trace.speech: 早晨，各位。我尋晚係個Robber，靜靜地睇咗[The Underdog]張牌。而家我變咗做Seer。[The Underdog]，你而家手上係我嗰張Robber牌。我好好奇，你尋晚係咩身份？今朝醒過嚟嗰陣，有冇覺得有咩唔同？唔使急，慢慢嚟——我哋有時間聽你講。
day_trace.log_line: [2026-07-05 16:16:51 HKT] The Therapist @The Underdog: 早晨，各位。我尋晚係個Robber，靜靜地睇咗[The Underdog]張牌。而家我變咗做Seer。[The Underdog]，你而家手上係我嗰張Robber牌。我好好奇，你尋晚係咩身份？今朝醒過嚟嗰陣，有冇覺得有咩唔同？唔使急，慢慢嚟——我哋有時間聽你講。

day_trace.speech:
好。新遊戲，重新開始。在敘事主導之前，我們先建立數據。我是[統計學家]。我的初始角色：<村民>。當前角色：我無從得知——夜晚記憶一片空白，這表示要麼沒有行動針對我，要麼我無法得知相關資訊。標準貝氏設定：在6人遊戲中，中央有2匹狼的情況下，<狼人>的先驗機率為2/6 ≈ 33%。但中央組成未知。

所有有夜晚行動的人——請說明你的角色、目標和確切結果。不要憑感覺。只要概似比。沒有行動的村民請說：'<村民>，無行動'，這樣我們才能統計空白的聲明。順序：檢察官、心理諮商師、攪局者、直覺俠、強盜。開始。
day_trace.log_line:
[2026-07-05 16:17:02 HKT] The Statistician: Right. New game, clean slate. Let's establish the data before narratives take over. I'm The Statistician. My initial role: Villager. Current role: unknown to me — night memory is blank, which means either no action targeted me or I lack visibility into it. Standard Bayesian setup: prior probability of Werewolf in 6-player game with 2 wolves in center is 2/6 ≈ 33%. But center composition unknown.

Everyone with a night action — state your role, target, and exact result. No feelings. Just the likelihood ratios. Villagers with no action: say 'Villager, no action' so we can count null claims. Order: Prosecutor, Therapist, Chaos Agent, Gut Player, Underdog. Go.

day_trace.speech: 現在開庭，我沒時間浪費在客套話上。我是<搗蛋鬼>。昨晚，我交換了[統計學家]和[攪局者]的卡片。這是事實。我不知道的是——而這張桌子必須知道的是——你們兩人在交換之後各自拿到了什麼。所以規則是這樣的：[統計學家]、[攪局者]，你們兩人都要作證。說出你們當前的角色和夜晚行動。不要謎語，不要『我等一下再說』，不要沒有任何資訊的模糊<預言家>聲明。你們兩人是這張桌子上唯一直接受到我的行動影響身分的人，這意味著你們的證詞是我們最重要的證據。其他人——在他們兩人發言之前先保留你們的聲明。我們先從已知事實建立時間線。現在——誰要發言？
day_trace.log_line: [2026-07-05 16:17:11 HKT] The Prosecutor @The Statistician: Court is now in session, and I'll waste no time with pleasantries. I am the Troublemaker. Last night, I swapped [The Statistician] and [The Chaos Agent]'s cards. That is a fact. What I don't know — and what this table NEEDS to know — is what either of you ended up with after that swap. So here's how this works: [The Statistician], [The Chaos Agent], you're both on the stand. State your current role and your night action. No riddles, no 'I'll share later,' no vague Seer claims with zero information. You two are the only players at this table whose identities were directly affected by MY action, which means your testimony is the most critical evidence we have. Everyone else — hold your claims until these two speak. We build the timeline from the known facts first. Now — who's talking?

day_trace.speech: 啊！嗯，[直覺俠]，很抱歉我又插話了，我知道我大概把大家都搞糊塗了……但是等等，你說你是<搗蛋鬼>，交換了[心理諮商師]和[統計學家]？可是……我原本是<預言家>，而現在我……我想我是<強盜>？一定有人在夜晚拿走了我的卡片。所以如果你只交換了那兩個人，那是誰跟我交換了？還是……哦不，是我搞錯了嗎？你是不是做了更多交換只是沒說出來？因為我的卡片確實變了，而且我不認為<搗蛋鬼>能做到那樣？除非……除非你其實不是<搗蛋鬼>？抱歉，我大概全都搞錯了，但數字好像對不上？還有……當我還是<預言家>的時候，我查看了[攪局者]，他們是<狼人>。好像還沒有人提到這件事？還是只有我看到這個？我覺得我讓大家都生氣了，真的很抱歉……
day_trace.log_line: [2026-07-05 16:17:14 HKT] The Underdog @The Gut Player: Oh! Um, [The Gut Player], I'm so sorry to jump in again, I know I'm probably confusing everyone... but wait, you said you were <Troublemaker> and swapped [The Therapist] and [The Statistician]? But... I started as <Seer> and now I'm... I think I'm <Robber>? Someone must have taken my card during the night. So if you only swapped those two, who swapped with me? Or... oh no, am I misunderstanding? Did you do more swaps and just not mention them? Because my card definitely changed, and I don't think Troublemaker can do that? Unless... unless you're not actually Troublemaker? I'm sorry, I'm probably getting this all wrong, but the math doesn't seem to add up? And also... when I was Seer, I looked at [The Chaos Agent] and they were <Werewolf>. Nobody's really addressed that yet? Or am I the only one who saw that? I feel like I'm making everyone mad, I'm so sorry...

day_trace.speech:
聽住，party people。我係 [The Chaos Agent]，每場game都用同一個方式開場——講啲冇辦法verify嘅claim。

尋晚我本來係<Werewolf>，冇錯你冇聽錯。我偷睇咗中間第0張牌——係，呢個唔係標準werewolf嘅做法，但呢度係chaos，我玩自己嘅rules。我見到咗咩？我唔會話你知，可能係Tanner，可能係會反轉成場game嘅嘢。

重點係：我本來係Werewolf，而家我係<Villager>。有人夜晚換咗我張牌。即係話我張Werewolf card而家喺第二個玩家手上。如果有人claim緊嘅role同佢本來starting position對唔上，嗰個就係狼。

所以喺任何人claim之前，問下自己：Troublemaker定Robber有冇掂過我？因為佢哋其中一個而家揸住我張Werewolf card，可能自己都唔知。我唔係要你信我，我係要你做數。邊個先？
day_trace.log_line:
[2026-07-05 16:17:31 HKT] The Chaos Agent: 聽住，party people。我係 The Chaos Agent，每場game都用同一個方式開場——講啲冇辦法verify嘅claim。

尋晚我本來係<Werewolf>，冇錯你冇聽錯。我偷睇咗中間第0張牌——係，呢個唔係標準werewolf嘅做法，但呢度係chaos，我玩自己嘅rules。我見到咗咩？我唔會話你知，可能係Tanner，可能係會反轉成場game嘅嘢。

重點係：我本來係Werewolf，而家我係<Villager>。有人夜晚換咗我張牌。即係話我張Werewolf card而家喺第二個玩家手上。如果有人claim緊嘅role同佢本來starting position對唔上，嗰個就係狼。

所以喺任何人claim之前，問下自己：Troublemaker定Robber有冇掂過我？因為佢哋其中一個而家揸住我張Werewolf card，可能自己都唔知。我唔係要你信我，我係要你做數。邊個先？

day_trace.speech: [2026-07-05 16:17:34 HKT] The Gut Player @The Underdog：喂，Underdog——等等。你在那邊說攪局者是<狼人>，但連說出來都要道歉？「如果錯了很抱歉」、「我可能搞混了」——不，我的直覺不相信連自己都不信任的人。當你親眼看到某件事，你就該確定。你聽起來像是在猜測，而不是有過<預言家>的視野。還有心理諮商師——你說你現在是<預言家>，因為你搶了Underdog？但我告訴過大家，我把你跟統計學家交換了！所以如果我的交換成功了，拿著那張<預言家>卡的是統計學家，不是你。事情有點不對勁，我的直覺告訴我，問題不在我這邊。
day_trace.log_line: [2026-07-05 16:17:34 HKT] The Gut Player @The Underdog: Oi, Underdog — hold up. You're sitting there saying Chaos Agent is a Werewolf, but you're apologizing for even saying it? 'Sorry if this is wrong,' 'I might be confused' — nah, my gut don't trust someone who can't even trust themselves. When you SEE something, you KNOW it. You sound like you're guessing, not like you had a Seer vision. And Therapist — you say you're Seer now 'cause you robbed Underdog? But I TOLD everyone I swapped you with Statistician! So if my swap went through, Statistician's the one holding that Seer card, not you. Something's cracking and my gut says it ain't my story.

day_trace.speech: 噢！嗯，[心理諮商師]，真的很抱歉，我不是故意忽略你……你問我昨晚是什麼角色？我原本是<預言家>。我查了[攪局者]，他們是<狼人>。但後來……我想你拿走了我的角色卡？因為你說你現在是<強盜>？所以那會讓我變成……<強盜>？是這樣運作的嗎？我還在努力理解這一切。但是……噢不，我大概又要惹某人生氣了……有件事真的很令人困惑。[直覺俠]說他們是<搗蛋鬼>，把你和[統計學家]交換了。但[嚴審官]也說他們是<搗蛋鬼>，把[統計學家]和[攪局者]交換了。只能有一個<搗蛋鬼>，對吧？所以……其中一個一定在說謊？我很抱歉，我不是想指控任何人，我只是……如果他們兩個都說實話，邏輯上說不通？而且你是<強盜>，這又多了更多有夜間行動的人……我大概又把大家搞糊塗了，真的很抱歉……
day_trace.log_line: [2026-07-05 16:17:46 HKT] The Underdog @The Therapist: Oh! Um, [The Therapist], I'm so sorry, I didn't mean to ignore you... you asked what I was last night? I started as the <Seer>. I looked at [The Chaos Agent] and they were a <Werewolf>. But then... I think you took my card? Because you said you're the <Robber> now? So that would make me... the <Robber>? Is that how this works? I'm still trying to wrap my head around it. But... oh no, I'm probably going to upset someone... there's something really confusing here. [The Gut Player] said they're the <Troublemaker> and swapped you with [The Statistician]. But [The Prosecutor] ALSO said they're the <Troublemaker> and swapped [The Statistician] with [The Chaos Agent]. There can only be one <Troublemaker>, right? So... one of them has to be lying? I'm so sorry, I don't mean to accuse anyone, I just... the math doesn't work if they're both telling the truth? And you're the <Robber>, so that makes even more people with night actions... I'm probably confusing everyone again, I'm really sorry...

day_trace.speech: [The Gut Player]，你話你swap咗我同[The Statistician]？我聽完之後坐低諗咗一陣。我尋晚係Robber，rob咗[The Underdog]，親眼睇到佢張牌係Seer，而家我係Seer。如果你真係swap過我同Statistician，我應該會變成Statistician嘅牌先啱。但[The Underdog]已經講咗佢尋晚係Seer——一場game唔會有兩個Seer㗎嘛。你個故事，有個位連唔埋。點解釋呢？另外，如果[The Underdog]講緊真話，[The Chaos Agent]就係Werewolf。我建議大家先唔好急，聽清楚邊個嘅故事先至兜得埋。
day_trace.log_line: [2026-07-05 16:18:10 HKT] The Therapist @The Gut Player: [The Gut Player]，你話你swap咗我同[The Statistician]？我聽完之後坐低諗咗一陣。我尋晚係Robber，rob咗[The Underdog]，親眼睇到佢張牌係Seer，而家我係Seer。如果你真係swap過我同Statistician，我應該會變成Statistician嘅牌先啱。但[The Underdog]已經講咗佢尋晚係Seer——一場game唔會有兩個Seer㗎嘛。你個故事，有個位連唔埋。點解釋呢？另外，如果[The Underdog]講緊真話，[The Chaos Agent]就係Werewolf。我建議大家先唔好急，聽清楚邊個嘅故事先至兜得埋。

day_trace.speech: 喂，Underdog——你之所以困惑是因爲你的牌變了，而你覺得我的<搗蛋鬼>交換無法解釋這件事？你說得對，它確實無法解釋——因爲我不是唯一一個聲稱自己是<搗蛋鬼>的人！[嚴審官]剛剛站出來說他們交換了統計學家和混亂特工。兩個搗蛋鬼？不，我的直覺告訴我，我們之中有一個人在睜眼說瞎話，而那個人不是我。我直接告訴你我的行動——交換了心理諮商師和統計學家。沒有花俏的法庭演講，沒有「等我允許你再發言」。只有實話。檢察官才是那個想把這場遊戲當成自己私人法庭的人，告訴每個人何時該說話、該說什麼。那不是<搗蛋鬼>——那是<狼人>在試圖控制局勢。我的直覺現在正在對我尖叫：檢察官是假的。你想知道爲什麼你的牌變了嗎，Underdog？也許去問問檢察官昨晚還做了什麼。
day_trace.log_line: [2026-07-05 16:18:22 HKT] The Gut Player @The Underdog: Oi, Underdog — you're confused 'cause your card changed and you think my Troublemaker swap don't explain it? You're RIGHT it don't explain it — 'cause I ain't the only one claiming Troublemaker! The Prosecutor just stood up and said THEY swapped Statistician and Chaos Agent. Two Troublemakers? Nah, my gut says ONE of us is lying through their teeth, and it ain't me. I told you straight up what I did — swapped Therapist and Statistician. No fancy courtroom speech, no 'hold your claims until I say so.' Just the truth. Prosecutor's the one trying to run this table like their personal courtroom, telling everyone when to talk and what to say. That ain't a Troublemaker — that's a Werewolf trying to control the narrative. My gut's screaming at me right now: Prosecutor's the fake. You wanna know why your card changed, Underdog? Maybe ask the Prosecutor what ELSE they did last night.

day_trace.speech: 哦！嗯，[直覺俠]，我很抱歉，我不是故意聽起來不確定——我確定我看到了什麼。當我是<預言家>的時候，我查看了[攪局者]，他們是<狼人>。這部分我很確定，我發誓。但是……但是有一件事真的讓我很困惑，我需要大家聽我說：你說你是<搗蛋鬼>。而[嚴審官]也說他們是<搗蛋鬼>。遊戲裡只有一個<搗蛋鬼>，對吧？所以……所以你們之中一定有一個人在說謊？我不是想指控任何人，我發誓，但邏輯上……如果你們兩個都說實話，那就不成立。而[心理諮商師]說他們是<強盜>，拿走了我的<預言家>牌，這意味著我現在是<強盜>……所以我們有兩個聲稱的搗蛋鬼、一個<強盜>，而我看到了一個<狼人>……抱歉，我可能把事情搞混了，但我們是不是應該先弄清楚哪個<搗蛋鬼>的聲明是真的，再投票給任何人？因爲其中一個一定是狼人，對吧？
day_trace.log_line: [2026-07-05 16:18:39 HKT] The Underdog @The Gut Player: Oh! Um, [The Gut Player], I'm so sorry, I don't mean to sound unsure - I KNOW what I saw. When I was the Seer, I looked at [The Chaos Agent] and they were a Werewolf. That part I'm certain about, I promise. But... but here's the thing that's really confusing me and I need everyone to hear this: you said you're the Troublemaker. And [The Prosecutor] ALSO said they're the Troublemaker. There's only ONE Troublemaker in the game, right? So... so one of you has to be lying? I'm not trying to accuse anyone, I swear, but the math just... it doesn't work if you're both telling the truth. And [The Therapist] says they're the Robber who took my Seer card, which would make me the Robber now... so we have two Troublemakers claimed, one Robber, and I saw a Werewolf... I'm sorry, I'm probably messing this up, but shouldn't we figure out which Troublemaker claim is real before we vote for anyone? Because one of them HAS to be the wolf, right?

day_trace.speech:
Underdog問得好——但我冇claim過<Seer>，我claim 嘅係：我本來係<Werewolf>，偷睇咗中間0號牌，見到<Tanner>。我哋兩個講嘅唔同嘢，所以你問「點解都睇過0號」本身就問錯晒。

<Prosecutor>話佢係<Troublemaker>，換咗我同<Statistician>。如果佢真係TM，咁我而家揸住Statistician本來嘅<Villager>牌，Statistician揸住我嘅<Werewolf> card。我role change咗，所以個swap真係發生咗。

<Underdog>用<Seer>嗰陣望到我係<Werewolf>，佢冇講大話。換完之後，<Statistician>先至係揸住<Werewolf> card嗰個。即係話——<Statistician>先係嗰隻狼，唔係我。

<Gut Player>嘅<Troublemaker> claim係假嘅。一場game得一個TM。<Prosecutor>嗰個版本解釋到我嘅role change，<Gut Player>嗰個解釋唔到。

不過我都係鍾意睇戲多過做戲。各位，繼續。
